output.input: {"query":"(AI workflow OR automation pipeline OR CI/CD AI OR agent automation OR workflow automation) lang:en","limit":10,"mode":"Top"}
output.name: x_keyword_search

content.text:
Here are some of the top English-language posts on X (formerly Twitter) matching your query on AI workflows, automation pipelines, CI/CD with AI, agent automation, and workflow automation. I've pulled the most relevant recent ones, focusing on practical examples, tools, and trends.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019101692449509698)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2018376206807114045)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2019023301826212194)[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2018338831171281138)[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2018411112237088892)

### Key Highlights:
1. **AI Data Pipelines for Voice Training** (@psdnai): Poseidon uses a multi-stage automation pipeline for filtering AI training-grade voice data—semantic scoring, language checks, and human validation. "Automation first. With humans in the loop."[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019101692449509698) (Includes image: https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HAVKEiZacAAAs4c.jpg)

2. **AI-Enhanced Demand Gen Pipeline** (@gophillionaire): A full-stack automation using Clay, InstantlyAI, HeyReach, HubSpot, and Slack to generate $50M+ in pipeline. Steps include data enrichment, multi-channel outreach, AI scripts, and re-engagement loops.[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2018376206807114045) (Includes image: https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HAK2cRmWQAACfAW.jpg)

3. **Client Pipeline Visualization in monday.com** (@ChisomOkpareke_): Step-by-step guide to building boards with groups (e.g., Lead → Completed), automations, Kanban views, and dashboards for workflow tracking.[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2019023301826212194)

4. **GenAI Quality Control Pipeline** (@cloudinary): Cloudinary Refiners automate background fixes and crop adjustments in production pipelines without manual slowdowns. Demo video included.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2018338831171281138) (Video: https://video.twimg.com/ext_tw_video/2018338709372866560/pu/vid/avc1/480x270/ku4gbcwBtoxdCn79.mp4?tag=12)

5. **Data Science Agents & Pipelines** (@tom_doerr): GitHub repo for "Agents for data science workflows and pipeline automation" – https://github.com/business-science/ai-data-science-team.[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2018411112237088892) (Includes image)

Other notable mentions include high-demand 2026 skills lists emphasizing DevOps/CI-CD automation, AI/ML pipelines, and MLOps,[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2018713904533438716)[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2018654369722544355) plus AI agents for content workflows and RAG setups.[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2017590748129137047)[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2017722357377282303)

These reflect buzzing topics like agentic AI, no-code tools (e.g., monday.com, n8n), and enterprise pipelines. Want deeper dives on any post, threads, or refined searches (e.g., Latest mode or specific dates)? Let me know!
